faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Open your account orders page and select Track Order. You will also receive a tracking link by email once the package ships.

faqs.question: How do I check my order status?
faqs.answer: Sign in to your account and open My Orders. Each order shows whether it is confirmed, packed, shipped, out for delivery, or delivered.

faqs.question: Can I cancel an order after placing it?
faqs.answer: You can cancel an order from the orders page while it is still being prepared. Once it has shipped, you can start a return after delivery.

faqs.question: Can I change items in my order?
faqs.answer: Items cannot be changed after an order is placed. Cancel the order while it is still being prepared, then place a new order with the correct items.

faqs.question: Can I change my delivery address?
faqs.answer: You can update the delivery address before the order is shipped. Go to the order details page and choose Change Address.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping usually takes 3 to 7 business days. Express shipping is available for eligible locations and typically arrives in 1 to 2 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer express delivery?
faqs.answer: Express delivery is available for selected products and locations. If eligible, you will see the express option during checkout.

faqs.question: What should I do if my delivery is delayed?
faqs.answer: Check the tracking link for the latest update. If there is no update for more than 48 hours, contact support with your order number.

faqs.question: Is there a shipping fee?
faqs.answer: Shipping fees depend on your location, cart value, and delivery speed. The final fee is shown before you complete checkout.

faqs.question: What is the return policy?
faqs.answer: Most items can be returned within 30 days of delivery if they are unused and in their original packaging.

faqs.question: How do I start a return?
faqs.answer: Open the order details page, select Return Item, choose a reason, and follow the pickup or drop-off instructions.

faqs.question: When will I receive my refund?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed after the returned item passes quality check. The money usually reaches the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days.

faqs.question: Can I exchange an item?
faqs.answer: Exchanges are available for eligible items when the requested size, color, or replacement product is in stock.

faqs.question: Which payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and selected wallet payments at checkout.

faqs.question: Why did my payment fail?
faqs.answer: Payments can fail because of incorrect details, bank limits, network issues, or expired sessions. Try again or use another payment method.

faqs.question: Where can I download my invoice?
faqs.answer: Invoices are available from the order details page after payment is confirmed. Choose Download Invoice to save a PDF copy.

faqs.question: How do I apply a promo code?
faqs.answer: Enter the promo code in the coupon field during checkout and select Apply before completing payment.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Select Forgot Password on the sign-in page, enter your registered email address, and follow the reset link we send you.

faqs.question: How do I update my account information?
faqs.answer: Go to Account Settings to update your name, phone number, saved addresses, and communication preferences.

faqs.question: Why can't I log in to my account?
faqs.answer: Check that your email and password are correct. If you still cannot sign in, reset your password or contact support.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support is available through live chat and email from 9 AM to 8 PM, Monday through Saturday.
